message:
feat: query_row result-row cap, COUNT(*) fast path, EXISTS rowid probe, materialized IN list

Connection layer (fsqlite-core):
- Add QUERY_ROW_RESULT_ROW_CAP (2) so query_row() short-circuits row
  collection after 2 rows instead of materializing the full result set
  before checking cardinality — this is the common path for scalar lookups
- New query_row_internal() unifies query_row/query_row_with_params with a
  fast path that bypasses deferred-query fallback and uses the row cap for
  simple queries without DISTINCT/LIMIT/ORDER BY
- literal_to_join_value: handle Blob, Null, CurrentTime/CurrentDate/
  CurrentTimestamp explicitly instead of collapsing them to Null
- 2 new tests: multi-row query_row error, DISTINCT late-cardinality check

Codegen layer (fsqlite-vdbe):
- Detect simple COUNT(*) queries (no joins, no GROUP BY, no HAVING, no
  windows, no LIMIT) and emit OP_Count for unfiltered scans or a
  SeekGE/Rewind + AddImm counter loop for filtered scans, avoiding the
  full AggStep/AggFinal pipeline
- EXISTS subquery optimization: extract rowid equality terms and emit
  SeekRowid direct probe instead of Rewind+scan when possible
- Materialized IN list: for IN clauses with >=8 literal/placeholder values
  using BINARY collation, emit a Once-guarded ephemeral autoindex
  (OpenAutoindex + IdxInsert) and probe with Found, avoiding repeated
  linear scans
- 4 new codegen tests

Engine layer (fsqlite-vdbe):
- New max_collected_result_rows field on VdbeEngine: OP_ResultRow discards
  rows past the cap while preserving register-clearing semantics
- Fix OP_OpenAutoindex non-memdb path: use PageNumber::new(1) instead of
  None so IdxInsert and Found actually work against the autoindex
- 3 new engine tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
